pokemon:metang.name: Metang
pokemon:metang.summary: When two Beldum fuse together, Metang is formed. The brains of the Beldum are joined by a magnetic nervous system. This Pokémon turns its arms to the rear for traveling at high speed.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When two Beldum fuse together, Metang is formed. The brains of the Beldum are joined by a magnetic nervous system. This Pokémon turns its arms to the rear for traveling at high speed.
It is formed by two Beldum joining together. Its steel body won’t be scratched if it collides with a jet.
It is formed by two Beldum joining together. Its two brains are linked, amplifying its psychic power.
It is formed by two BELDUM joining together. Its steel body won’t be scratched if it collides with a jet.
The claws tipping its arms pack the destructive power to tear through thick iron sheets as if they were silk. It flies at over 60 miles per hour.
It floats midair using magnetism. Its body is so tough, even a crash with a jet plane won’t leave a scratch.
When two BELDUM fuse together, a magnetic nervous system places their brains in union.
It floats midair using magnetism. Its body is so tough, even a crash with a jet plane won’t leave a scratch.
It adores magnetic minerals, so it pursues Nosepass at speeds exceeding 60 mph.

When two Beldum fuse together, Metang is formed. The brains of the Beldum are joined by a magnetic nervous system. By linking its brains magnetically, this Pokémon generates strong psychokinetic power.
It is formed by two BELDUM joining together. Its steel body won’t be scratched if it collides with a jet.
It is formed by two BELDUM joining together. Its steel body won’t be scratched if it collides with a jet.

When two BELDUM fuse together, METANG is formed. The brains of the BELDUM are joined by a magnetic nervous system. By linking its brains magnetically, this POKéMON generates strong psychokinetic power.
When two BELDUM fuse together, METANG is formed. The brains of the BELDUM are joined by a magnetic nervous system. This POKéMON turns its arms to the rear for traveling at high speed.
Using magnetic forces to stay aloft, this Pokémon flies at high speeds, weaving through harsh mountain terrain in pursuit of prey.
When two BELDUM fuse together, a magnetic nervous system places their brains in union.
When two Beldum link together, their psychic power is doubled. Their intelligence, however, remains unchanged.
Two Beldum have become stuck together via their own magnetic forces. With two brains, the resulting Metang has doubled psychic powers.
It flies at high speeds around the skies. When it finds its prey, Metang takes a firm grip with its sharp claws and never lets go.
With its two brains, it fires powerful psychic energy to stop its prey in their tracks.
It is formed by two Beldum joining together. Its steel body won’t be scratched if it collides with a jet.
It is formed by two Beldum joining together. Its two brains are linked, amplifying its psychic power.
It is formed by two Beldum joining together. Its steel body won’t be scratched if it collides with a jet.
It is formed by two Beldum joining together. Its two brains are linked, amplifying its psychic power.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When two Beldum fuse together, Metang is formed. The brains of the Beldum are joined by a magnetic nervous system. This Pokémon turns its arms to the rear for traveling at high speed.

pokemon:beldum.name: Beldum
pokemon:beldum.summary: Beldum keeps itself floating by generating a magnetic force that repels earth’s natural magnetism. When it sleeps, this Pokémon anchors itself to a cliff using the hooks on its rear.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Beldum keeps itself floating by generating a magnetic force that repels earth’s natural magnetism. When it sleeps, this Pokémon anchors itself to a cliff using the hooks on its rear.
It converses with others by using magnetic pulses. In a swarm, they move in perfect unison.
Its cells are all magnetic, and it communicates with others by using magnetic pulses.
It converses with others by using magnetic pulses. In a swarm, they move in perfect unison.
When BELDUM gather in a swarm, they move in perfect unison as if they were but one POKéMON. They communicate with each other using brain waves.
It uses magnetic waves to converse with its kind. All the cells in its body are magnetic.
The magnetic force generated by its body repels the ground’s natural magnetism, letting it float.
It uses magnetic waves to converse with its kind. All the cells in its body are magnetic.
With magnetic traction, it pulls its opponents in close. When they’re in range, it slashes them with its rear claws.
Instead of blood, a powerful magnetic force courses throughout Beldum’s body. This Pokémon communicates with others by sending controlled pulses of magnetism.
It converses with others by using magnetic pulses. In a swarm, they move in perfect unison.
It converses with others by using magnetic pulses. In a swarm, they move in perfect unison.
Instead of blood, a powerful magnetic force courses throughout BELDUM’s body. This POKéMON communicates with others by sending controlled pulses of magnetism.
BELDUM keeps itself floating by generating a magnetic force that repels earth’s natural magnetism. When it sleeps, this POKéMON anchors itself to a cliff using the hooks on its rear.
The cells in this Pokémon’s body are composed of magnetic material. Instead of blood, magnetic forces flow through Beldum’s body.
The magnetic force generated by its body repels the ground’s natural magnetism, letting it float.
Its cells are all magnets. It uses magnetism to communicate with others of its kind.
From its rear, Beldum emits a magnetic force that rapidly pulls opponents in. They get skewered on Beldum’s sharp claws.
If you anger it, it will do more than rampage. It will also burst out strong magnetism, causing nearby machines to break.
Instead of blood, magnetism flows through its body. When it’s feeling bad, try giving it a magnet.
It converses with others by using magnetic pulses. In a swarm, they move in perfect unison.
Its cells are all magnetic, and it communicates with others by using magnetic pulses.
The magnetic force generated by its body repels the ground’s natural magnetism, letting it float.
It converses with others by using magnetic pulses. In a swarm, they move in perfect unison.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Beldum keeps itself floating by generating a magnetic force that repels earth’s natural magnetism. When it sleeps, this Pokémon anchors itself to a cliff using the hooks on its rear.

pokemon:metagross.name: Metagross
pokemon:metagross.summary: Metagross is the result of two Metang achieving fusion. When hunting, this Pokémon pins the prey to the ground under its massive body. It then eats the helpless victim using the large mouth on its stomach.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Metagross is the result of two Metang achieving fusion. When hunting, this Pokémon pins the prey to the ground under its massive body. It then eats the helpless victim using the large mouth on its stomach.
Metang combined to form it. With four brains, it has the intelligence of a supercomputer.
With four linked brains, it’s more intelligent than a supercomputer, and it uses calculations to analyze foes.
METANG combined to form it. With four brains, it has the intelligence of a supercomputer.
METAGROSS has four brains that are joined by a complex neural network. As a result of integration, this POKéMON is smarter than a supercomputer.
It is formed by two METANG fusing. Its four brains are said to be superior to a supercomputer.
It folds its four legs when flying. Its four brains are said to be superior to a supercomputer.
It is formed by two METANG fusing. Its four brains are said to be superior to a supercomputer.
A linkage of two Metang, this Pokémon can perform any calculation in a flash by utilizing parallel processing in its four brains.
Metagross has four brains in total. Combined, the four brains can breeze through difficult calculations faster than a supercomputer. This Pokémon can float in the air by tucking in its four legs.
METANG combined to form it. With four brains, it has the intelligence of a supercomputer.
METANG combined to form it. With four brains, it has the intelligence of a supercomputer.
METAGROSS has four brains in total. Combined, the four brains can breeze through difficult calculations faster than a supercomputer. This POKéMON can float in the air by tucking in its four legs.

METAGROSS is the result of two METANG achieving fusion. When hunting, this POKéMON pins the prey to the ground under its massive body. It then eats the helpless victim using the large mouth on its stomach.
Metagross is the result of the fusion of two Metang. This Pokémon defeats its opponents through use of its supercomputer-level brain.
It folds its four legs when flying. Its four brains are said to be superior to a supercomputer.
It firmly pins its prey using its four claws and large body. Then the teeth in the mouth on its stomach chew the prey to bits.
Because the magnetic powers of these Pokémon get stronger in freezing temperatures, Metagross living on snowy mountains are full of energy.
It analyzes its opponents with more accuracy than a supercomputer, which enables it to calmly back them into a corner.
It boasts not only psychic powers but also fantastic strength. It grabs its prey with its four legs and holds them in place with its claws.
Metang combined to form it. With four brains, it has the intelligence of a supercomputer.
With four linked brains, it’s more intelligent than a supercomputer, and it uses calculations to analyze foes.
With four linked brains, it’s more intelligent than a supercomputer, and it uses calculations to analyze foes.
Metang combined to form it. With four brains, it has the intelligence of a supercomputer.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Metagross is the result of two Metang achieving fusion. When hunting, this Pokémon pins the prey to the ground under its massive body. It then eats the helpless victim using the large mouth on its stomach.
